Home Keybinds Docs

Reference

Keybinds

Every default binding in TenebraOS, straight from the shipped Hyprland config. Search, filter by category, or hit Enter on a row to copy the bind.

36 of 36 shown

Keybind Description Category
Super+W Close the focused window Window Management
ALT+Tab Cycle focus through open windows Window Management
Super+Mouse Drag Move a window by dragging it Window Management
Super+Right Mouse Drag Resize a window by dragging its edge Window Management
Super+Arrow Keys Move focus to the window in that direction Window Management
Super+Shift+Arrow Keys Swap the focused window with its neighbor Window Management
Shift+F11 Toggle fullscreen for the focused window Window Management
Super+Shift+V Toggle floating mode for the focused window Window Management
Super+P Toggle pseudo-tiling for the focused window Window Management
Super+1–9 Switch to workspace 1 through 9 Workspace Navigation
Super+0 Switch to workspace 10 Workspace Navigation
Super+Shift+1–9 Move the focused window to workspace 1 through 9 Workspace Navigation
Super+Shift+0 Move the focused window to workspace 10 Workspace Navigation
Super+Tab Cycle to the next workspace Workspace Navigation
Super+Shift+Tab Cycle to the previous workspace Workspace Navigation
Super+Mouse Wheel Scroll through workspaces Workspace Navigation
Super+T Open a terminal (kitty) Application Launchers
Super+B Open the web browser (Floorp) Application Launchers
Super+F Open the file manager (Nautilus) Application Launchers
Super+Space Open the Noctalia application launcher Application Launchers
Super+M Open the music player (Plexamp) Application Launchers
Super+L Lock the screen (hyprlock) System Controls
Brightness Up Key Raise the screen brightness System Controls
Brightness Down Key Lower the screen brightness System Controls
Print Capture a screenshot of a selected region (grimblast) Screenshot / Recording
Super+Print Capture a screenshot of the full screen (grimblast) Screenshot / Recording
Super+Shift+Print Capture a screenshot of the active window (grimblast) Screenshot / Recording
Volume Up Key Raise the system volume Media Controls
Volume Down Key Lower the system volume Media Controls
Mute Key Mute or unmute the system audio Media Controls
Play / Pause Key Play or pause the current media Media Controls
Next Track Key Skip to the next track Media Controls
Previous Track Key Go back to the previous track Media Controls
Super+Ctrl+R Reload the Noctalia shell Hyprland Session
Super+Escape Open the session and power menu Hyprland Session
Super+Shift+E Exit the Hyprland session Hyprland Session

// no keybinds match — clear the search or pick another category
